summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RBP (Remote Business Partner) Figma UX/UI implementation. Backend health check working perfectly, all main routes rendering correctly with professional design from Figma export.

ui_bugs.issue: Help Centre navigation link had timeout issue during automated testing
ui_bugs.note: May be a timing issue with test automation rather than actual bug

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
All navigation items present (DocuShare, Partner Offers, Services, Membership, Applications, Knowledge Center)
Feature cards section displays all 6 cards correctly
Footer renders with proper branding and copyright
Member login page (/member/login) renders with email, password fields and Sign In button
Signup step 1 (/signup/step1) renders plan selection with all three plans
Member dashboard (/member/dashboard) renders with sidebar navigation and dashboard content
Admin dashboard (/admin) renders with admin sidebar and dashboard overview
All layouts (PublicLayout, MemberPortalLayout, AdminLayout) working correctly
React Router client-side routing functioning properly
Professional UI/UX from Figma export implemented correctly
